title: Nvidia says its AI data center design runs hotter to use a lot less water
abstract: Public pushback against data centers has emphasized their water and energy consumption, and now Nvidia is highlighting its claim that the Rubin generation reference design for a fully liquid-cooled da
abstract_zh: 伙计们！Nvidia的这个**AI data center design**可是个省水高手，运行温度比常温还高，但却能大大减少用水量。写周报时再也不用担心服务器因耗水量大而“哭穷”了；调Bug时也更放心，因为它不仅高效冷却，还能让你的工作效率up up！快来试试吧！
